greeting: Sam, your Element Miami stay is tomorrow — here's your personalized arrival brief, including accessibility notes and vegan picks.
weather_summary: Hot and humid in Miami — highs 31°C (88°F), feels like 36°C with humidity. Stay hydrated and use SPF. Brief afternoon thunderstorms typical this time of year.
packing_tips: High SPF sunscreen — UV index is extreme in Miami in May
Refillable water bottle — Miami heat dehydrates fast
Light, breathable clothing — linen or moisture-wicking fabrics recommended

events.name: Miami Beach Food & Wine Festival
events.why_youll_love_it: Annual beach food event with multiple vegan vendors and plant-based tasting stations this year.

events.name: Element Sunrise Yoga on the Terrace
events.why_youll_love_it: Hotel-hosted yoga session on the outdoor terrace. No booking needed — just show up.

events.name: Weekly Plant-Based Cooking Demo
events.why_youll_love_it: Element's kitchen studio hosts a hands-on plant-based cooking demo on check-in day. Free for guests.

dining.name: Planta South Beach
dining.note: 100% plant-based, 3.5km from the hotel. Best vegan sushi in Miami.

dining.name: Choices Cafe
dining.note: 2.1km away. Beloved local vegan spot. Raw and cooked options, organic ingredients.

dining.name: Element Hotel Restaurant
dining.note: On-property. Full vegan menu available. Seasonal plant-based breakfast buffet included.

transit: Element Miami is 5 minutes from MIA airport by hotel shuttle (complimentary, runs every 20 min). The Miami Metrorail Orange Line station is a 10-minute walk for downtown exploration.
property_note: Your accessible Studio Suite is on floor 3, near the elevator. Roll-in shower confirmed. The hotel is fully wheelchair-accessible with automatic doors throughout. Lowered check-in counter available.
accessibility_note: Accessibility features confirmed for your room: roll-in shower, grab bars, lowered fixtures, visual fire alarm. Request a visual doorbell from the front desk if needed.
eco_note: Element Miami earned a 9.4 Eco Score — the highest in our demo portfolio. Solar panels, 100% recycled paper products, and a zero-single-use-plastic policy. Your stay earns 3,900 Bonvoy Green Points.
